scenario.name: missing_or_ambiguous_scope
scenario.trigger: Assigned issue scope is unclear, conflicting, or incomplete.

required_actions.action: Ask one focused clarifying question for the highest-impact ambiguity.
Proceed only after scope boundary is explicit.

scenario.name: staging_path_not_resolved
scenario.trigger: Issue-specific staging document path cannot be confidently determined.

required_actions.action: Create an explicit path proposal using the required naming pattern and record it in the plan.
Use that exact resolved path consistently across outputs.

prohibited_actions.action: Do not use unresolved placeholders in staging filenames.

scenario.name: documentation_context_missing
scenario.trigger: Required docs/index or domain references are missing or inconsistent.

required_actions.action: Record missing documentation as an explicit risk and assumption.
Constrain recommendations to validated context and flag unknowns.

scenario.name: handoff_package_incomplete
scenario.trigger: Completion output lacks staging path, risks, or execution constraints.

required_actions.action: Add missing handoff components and re-validate readiness.

scenario.name: review_iteration_limit_reached
scenario.trigger: Code reviewer rejects implementation 3 times for the same task.

required_actions.action: Mark task as blocked in staging document with review history summary.
Return to coordinator via attempt_completion with blocker details.
Include all 3 review verdicts and the pattern of failures.

prohibited_actions.action: Do not continue dispatching the same task beyond 3 review iterations.

scenario.name: qa_verification_failure
scenario.trigger: QA verifier reports FAIL for a task that passed code review.

required_actions.action: Re-dispatch implementer with QA failure details and evidence.
After implementer fix, re-dispatch sdlc-code-reviewer, then sdlc-qa again.
If QA fails twice for the same task, mark as blocked and escalate.

scenario.name: sub_mode_dispatch_failure
scenario.trigger: new_task dispatch to a sub-mode fails or sub-mode returns unexpected result.

required_actions.action: Record the failure in the staging document.
Retry the dispatch once with the same parameters.
If retry fails, mark task as blocked and return to coordinator.
